Z1.label: Object
Z1.description: the root concept of an item in the Wikifunctions system, from which all other objects descend

Z2.label: Persistent object
Z2.description: A Z1/Object which is stored persistently on the Wikifunctions wiki.

Z3.label: Key
Z3.description: A referenced key/value pair within a Z4/Type.

Z4.label: Type
Z4.description: A class of Z1/Object, with a set list of Z3/Keys.

Z5.label: Error
Z5.description: An error where something has gone wrong in the system, such as when you use a Z40/Boolean function on a Z6/String, or try to edit something that is locked.

Z6.label: String
Z6.description: A sequence of characters, and one of the fundamental Z4/Types available in the Wikifunctions system.

Z7.label: Function call
Z7.description: A call to a Z8/Function, including its inputs.

Z8.label: Function
Z8.description: A concept of a computable resource, which through its Z14/Implementations and Z20/Testers can let you make a calculation or perform some other task.

Z11.label: Monolingual text
Z11.description: A Z6/String of text in a given Z60/Natural language, used to label things for humans to read.

Z12.label: Multilingual text
Z12.description: A list of Z11/MonolingualStrings, up to one for each Z60/Natural language, used to label things for humans to read in multiple languages.

Z14.label: Implementation
Z14.description: An implementation of a Z8/Function which can be checked as working through its Z20/Test cases and if working can be used in a Z7/Function call.

Z16.label: Code
Z16.description: A block of code for a Z14/Implementation.

Z17.label: Argument declaration
Z17.description: A specification of what an input to a Z8/Function should be.

Z18.label: Argument reference
Z18.description: A link to an input to a Z7/Function call, or placeholder for one.

Z20.label: Test case
Z20.description: A special call to a Z8/Function used to check if a Z14/Implementation returns the expected result.

Z21.label: Unit
Z21.description: type that can take only a single value

Z22.label: Evaluation result
Z22.description: The result of a Z7/Function call

Z23.label: Nothing
Z23.description: No instances of this are allowed.

Z31.label: Monolingual stringset
Z31.description: A sequence of Z6/Strings in a given Z60/Natural language, used to document multiple human-readable labels for something, like aliases.

Z32.label: Multilingual stringset
Z32.description: A list of Z31/Monolingual stringsets, up to one for each Z60/Natural language, used to document multiple labels for humans to read in multiple languages.

Z40.label: Boolean
Z40.description: Either 'true' or 'false', and is one of the fundamental Z4/Types available in the Wikifunctions system

Z46.label: Type converter to code
Z46.description: A function that converts an instance of a Wikifunctions type into one understood by a programming language

Z50.label: Error type
Z50.description: এই উইকিতে গণ্ডগোল হলে যে বস্তু উৎপাদন হয় তার রকম
